name: prompt closed-loop step ab-to-promote accepts a winning version into the registry as the new active
command: mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.1.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step ab-to-promote --prompt-id x --winner v1.1.0 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned: promote x@v1.1.0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
